title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - CA-2
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: CA-2 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control CA-2 in the Assessment, Authorization, and Monitoring family. The control title for CA-2 is Control Assessments. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: IA-3 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, IA-3, belongs to the Identification and Authentication family and is titled Device Identification and Authentication. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
